workExperience.title: Multimodal LLM Developer (Freelance)
workExperience.description: Developed a sophisticated multimodal LLM system capable of processing text, image, and audio inputs. Integrated CLIP for image embeddings, Whisper for audio processing, and fine-tuned Phi model using QLoRA.
achievements: Built end-to-end multimodal pipeline combining CLIP, Whisper, and LLM
Implemented efficient image embedding preprocessing system
Developed custom projection layers for CLIP and Whisper outputs
Created ChatGPT-like interface supporting multiple input modalities

workExperience.title: Research Collaborator
workExperience.description: Developed collaborative open-source solutions for German grocery e-commerce. Implemented Word2Vec model with 40% improvement over Bag of Words. Enhanced recommendation search results by 30%.
achievements: Built AI solutions for real-world problems
Improved search accuracy by 40% using Word2Vec

workExperience.title: Data Scientist Intern
workExperience.description: Worked on data analysis and machine learning projects for government applications. Developed predictive models and data visualization dashboards.
achievements: Built ML models for government data analysis
